name: coc
description: End-to-end local web application for hospital CoC accreditation tracking with auditor-visible outputs.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.test:all: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.test:all:full: npm run test:all && npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run build
